reviews.review_title: just a rip off of other games
reviews.review_description: This game is a cash grab and has no time spent on it, this games levels are literally just big scary like level 2  I don't really need to explain it that much, the game in general is just really buggy it has gaps every where the jump scares barley work the cosmetics are poorly made and the packs cost 5 dollars witch cost way to much for how they look they have a mode that is technically voxel horror this game has the same sound for every thing and has the park core from chimp labs witch was basically stolen and the game is just really bad don't get it.
This game has so much to offer and it’s amazing. There are some issues but they are working on it as i write this review, all of the current levels are fun to play with friends and others
